## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## User or maintainer impact

Explain the practical effect of the change.

## Data and methodology

- Source release and school years:
- Grain and primary key:
- Suppression or comparability implications:
- Licensing or redistribution review:

Use "Not applicable" when the change does not affect data.

## Validation

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] Source values reconciled with official evidence when applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No raw restricted data, credentials, or personal information added
- [ ] Repository content is written in English
